title: lathyrus obovatus
intro: Lathyrus obovatus, also known as the woolly pea or woolly lathyrus, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Lathyrus obovatus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its flowers and leaves in hot water or using it as a tincture, although these preparations should only be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
